title: Add workflow replay checks

tasks.title: Add replay fixture harness and incident-class compatibility check
tasks.verification: RED: Worker.runReplayHistory against exported fixGateAutoWorktree history failed with DeterminismViolationError: [TMPRL1100] UpsertWorkflowSearchAttributesMachine does not handle HistoryEvent(id: 182, ActivityTaskScheduled). GREEN: added sanitized committed replay fixture and compatibility patch for discovery contract readiness; pnpm test -- src/temporal/__tests__/replay-determinism.test.ts src/temporal/gate-readiness.test.ts src/temporal/workflows.signal-handlers.test.ts passed; pnpm run typecheck passed; pnpm run format:check passed; pnpm run lint passed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added committed sanitized fixGateAutoWorktree replay fixture plus metadata and a replay-determinism Vitest using Worker.runReplayHistory. The fixture covers the observed TMPRL1100 class where legacy discovery gate completion scheduled inspectArtifactActivity at event 182 before search-attribute upsert. Added a targeted wf.patched compatibility branch for discovery contract readiness so legacy histories without the marker replay the old no-contract-blocker path, while new histories retain typed contract enforcement. Gate readiness gained an explicit enforceDiscoveryContract option for structural branching.
tasks.notes: Added replay fixture harness and fixed the observed incident class. Checkpoint commit c52596ff9936060dfab167cc116080b2cf8d00ad. Verification: RED runReplayHistory failed with TMPRL1100 event 182 before compatibility fix; GREEN replay fixture and related Temporal tests passed; typecheck, format:check, lint passed.

error_recovery.last_error: Worker.runReplayHistory against the exported fixGateAutoWorktree history failed with DeterminismViolationError: [TMPRL1100] UpsertWorkflowSearchAttributesMachine does not handle HistoryEvent(id: 182, ActivityTaskScheduled).
error_recovery.next_strategy: Continue with adv_wip_state poisoned workflow metadata exposure.

attempts.error: DeterminismViolationError during replay: [TMPRL1100] UpsertWorkflowSearchAttributesMachine does not handle HistoryEvent(id: 182, ActivityTaskScheduled).
attempts.diagnosis: Current discovery contract-readiness enforcement changed the command sequence for legacy discovery gate histories; current code upserted search attributes where old history scheduled inspectArtifactActivity.
attempts.fix_tried: Added wf.patched('discovery-contract-readiness-v1') to skip discovery contract blockers only for legacy histories without the patch marker; added sanitized replay fixture and replay test.

tasks.title: Add per-change worktree query poison isolation
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm test -- src/tools/worktree/state-session-lifecycle.test.ts failed with existing array-returning listWorktreesAcrossChanges and uncaught poisoned query. GREEN: pnpm test -- src/tools/worktree/state-session-lifecycle.test.ts src/tools/recovery-probe.test.ts src/tools/backlog.test.ts passed; pnpm run typecheck passed; pnpm run format:check passed; pnpm run lint passed before formatting.
tasks.implementation_summary: Changed listWorktreesAcrossChanges to return a structured result with records, warnings, poisonedWorkflows, and unavailable. Added per-change try/catch around getWorktreesQuery so one poisoned workflow no longer hides healthy worktrees. Reused recovery-probe and recovery-classification helpers to classify poisoned describe evidence and completed/missing workflow errors. Added bounded evidence summaries via recovery-probe. Updated backlog default worktree provider to consume result.records. Added tests for healthy+poisoned workflow query isolation.
tasks.notes: Implemented per-change poison isolation for cross-change worktree reads. Checkpoint commit 3e1f549ff85d05d2e9c826028553d462976d6c03. Verification: RED state-session lifecycle test failed before implementation; GREEN targeted worktree/recovery-probe/backlog tests passed; typecheck, format:check, and lint passed.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial RED test showed old implementation returned a raw array and threw on a poisoned per-change workflow query.
error_recovery.next_strategy: Continue with next task for adv_wip_state metadata exposure.

attempts.error: state-session-lifecycle test failed: expected structured records/warnings/poisonedWorkflows result; poisoned query threw Error: Failed to query Workflow.
attempts.diagnosis: listWorktreesAcrossChanges needed structural result and per-change query isolation instead of raw await in loop.
attempts.fix_tried: Added structured result types, per-change try/catch, poisoned describe evidence reuse, and consumer/test updates.

tasks.title: Expose automation-first poisoned workflow metadata in adv_wip_state
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm test -- src/tools/backlog.test.ts failed because poisoned_workflows was undefined and structured worktree provider results were not normalized. GREEN: pnpm test -- src/tools/backlog.test.ts src/tools/worktree/state-session-lifecycle.test.ts passed; pnpm run typecheck passed; pnpm run lint passed; pnpm run format:check passed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended adv_wip_state with additive poisoned_workflows output. Added WipPoisonedWorkflowEntry with source:'worktrees' and normalized structured worktree provider results from listWorktreesAcrossChanges. Preserved human-readable warnings by mapping per-worktree workflow warnings into the existing warnings array. Kept legacy array-returning test providers compatible. Added tests for empty poison metadata and healthy worktrees plus poisoned workflow metadata.
tasks.notes: Exposed automation-first poisoned workflow metadata in adv_wip_state. Checkpoint commit ba4fe0d15e7c66c359a5d9266ed7be98f0f57b3e. Verification: RED backlog test failed on missing poisoned_workflows/normalization; GREEN backlog + worktree tests passed; typecheck, lint, format:check passed.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial RED backlog test showed poisoned_workflows was undefined and structured worktree provider objects were treated as worktree arrays.

attempts.error: backlog.test failed: expected poisoned_workflows []; received undefined; structured provider object appeared as parsed.worktrees object instead of array.
attempts.diagnosis: adv_wip_state response and provider seam still assumed worktreesProvider returns a raw WipWorktreeEntry array.
attempts.fix_tried: Added provider result union, normalization, poisoned_workflows mapping, warning preservation, and tests.

tasks.title: Update replay/versioning/recovery specs and runbook
tasks.verification: Spec JSON parsed successfully for advance-workflow, backlog-coordination, and worktree-lifecycle. adv_change_validate strict passed with only existing NO_DELTAS warning. Docs format check passed for temporal-recovery.md and spec mirrors. Updated specs/runbook with replay/versioning rule, poison WIP metadata, worktree poison visibility, quarantine/read-only posture, and worker restart caveat.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added advance-workflow requirement rq-workflowVersioning01 for committed replay verification, command-producing workflow evolution strategy, patch deprecation/rationale, and worker-restart caveat. Added backlog-coordination rq-wipPoisonIsolation01 for adv_wip_state poisoned_workflows plus warning preservation and read-only triage posture. Added worktree-lifecycle rq-worktreePoisonVisibility01 for per-change query isolation, structured poison metadata, and explicit unavailable results. Updated docs/specs mirrors where present and docs/temporal-recovery.md with replay/versioning decision table and poisoned WIP read-only posture.
tasks.notes: Updated replay/versioning/recovery specs and runbook. Checkpoint commit 870c8d371b539cf9143962ef8fbbbd56b64959a8. Verification: spec JSON parsed; adv_change_validate strict passed with expected NO_DELTAS warning; docs format check passed.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial docs/spec JSON formatting pass reformatted entire spec JSON files, creating noisy diffs.

attempts.error: Spec JSON formatting produced large unrelated diffs across advance-workflow/backlog/worktree specs.
attempts.diagnosis: Prettier JSON formatting was not required by repo checks and would obscure the actual spec-law additions.
attempts.fix_tried: Restored spec JSON baseline formatting, reapplied targeted spec additions with minimal patch diff, and validated JSON parsing plus docs format.

tasks.title: Run full verification and release-readiness checks
tasks.verification: Release harden remediation: fixed documentation hygiene blocker/high findings, added recovery classifier/probe alignment comments, linked replay fixture to patch marker, clarified safeUpdateHandler signal/update semantics, documented backlog top semantics, added structural continue-as-new seedState completeness test, and tracked pre-existing worktree mutation stubs as agenda item ag-dU2Zn74X. Verification passed: exact targeted vitest file run, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, full pnpm test, strict adv_change_validate with expected NO_DELTAS warning.
tasks.notes: Full verification and release-readiness checks passed. Checkpoint commit 34e3e4c4837eef3495666666b24d502eb46f3205. Verification: targeted tests including spec-citation invariant passed; pnpm run check passed; pnpm run build passed; full pnpm test passed; adv_change_validate strict passed with expected NO_DELTAS warning.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial consolidated targeted test run failed spec-citation-invariant because the three new requirements lacked external citations.

attempts.error: spec-citation-invariant: rq-workflowVersioning01, rq-wipPoisonIsolation01, and rq-worktreePoisonVisibility01 had no external citation outside docs/specs and own spec.json.
attempts.diagnosis: New spec requirements must be cited in implementing code/docs outside spec mirrors.
attempts.fix_tried: Added requirement citations to replay-determinism.test.ts, backlog.ts, and worktree/state.ts, then reran targeted tests and full verification.

wisdom.content: For cross-change Temporal visibility readers, return a structural partial-result object (`records`, `warnings`, `poisonedWorkflows`, `unavailable`) instead of throwing or returning a raw array. Wrap each per-workflow query in its own try/catch, classify with existing recovery probes/classifiers, and continue so one poisoned workflow cannot hide healthy WIP.

Replay failure `UpsertWorkflowSearchAttributesMachine does not handle HistoryEvent(... ActivityTaskScheduled)` can mean current readiness logic skipped an activity that legacy history scheduled, not that search-attribute code itself is wrong. Inspect the signal payload and event window around the failing event, then patch the exact command-producing branch (`wf.patched`) so old histories replay the old activity path.

When evolving tool provider seams from arrays to structured partial results, keep a normalization layer that accepts both the old array shape and the new object shape. This preserves existing tests/callers while allowing richer automation metadata such as `poisoned_workflows`.

Spec JSON files are not part of `pnpm run format:check`; running Prettier over whole spec JSON can create noisy unrelated diffs. For spec-law edits, preserve existing JSON formatting and validate with JSON parse/adv_change_validate, while applying Prettier only to markdown mirrors/docs that are checked for readability.

Adding new spec requirements requires external citations outside docs/specs and the spec.json itself. The invariant fails even when implementation tests pass. Add `rq-*` anchors near the implementing code/tests (e.g. replay test, backlog tool, worktree state) before full-suite verification.

proposal.approval_evidence: Proposal approved inline by user reply `continue`; proceeding to discovery. B/F/S scan was clean and strict validation passed with expected pre-prep warnings only.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery findings persisted; user approved acceptance criteria/agreement with reply `approve`; contract minted with 32 items. Decisions: quarantine-first recovery, blocking replay checks, warning metadata optimized for automation/agent triage.

design.approval_evidence: Design persisted. Mandatory independent validator returned CAUTION, no CONFLICT; cautions incorporated: single structured listWorktreesAcrossChanges result, simplified design planes, fixture-vs-live replay tradeoff, Worker Versioning rationale. No user-value tradeoff or contract-compromise risk.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan with reply `approve`. Five-task graph covers replay fixture harness, per-change worktree poison isolation, adv_wip_state poisoned metadata, specs/runbook, and full verification. Contract refs and TDD intent assigned.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete: all 5 tasks done with checkpoints. Verification passed: targeted tests including replay determinism/spec citation/backlog/worktree/gate/workflow signal coverage; pnpm run check; pnpm run build; full pnpm test; strict validation passed with only expected NO_DELTAS warning.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work with reply `accept`. Acceptance review APPROVED after remediation. Fixed continue-as-new seed preservation issue, strengthened visibility escaping, expanded recovery-probe tests. Contract review matrix persisted with 32 rows and zero failing rows. Executive summary persisted. Verification passed: targeted tests, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, full pnpm test, strict validation with expected NO_DELTAS warning.

items.text: Replay verification fails when the current workflow bundle cannot replay captured/sanitized ADV `changeWorkflow` histories.

At least one fixture covers the observed `fixGateAutoWorktree` class: `[TMPRL1100] Nondeterminism error: UpsertWorkflowSearchAttributesMachine does not handle HistoryEvent(id: 182, ActivityTaskScheduled)`.

Workflow-code changes that add, remove, or reorder command-producing operations require `wf.patched`, Worker Versioning, or an explicit reset/recovery plan before archive; patch markers include a deprecation plan or documented rationale.
`listWorktreesAcrossChanges` isolates per-change query failures and returns healthy worktrees from other changes.
`adv_wip_state` exposes structured poisoned-workflow metadata optimized for automation, agent triage, and tooling while preserving human-readable warnings.
Existing poisoned terminal workflows are quarantined/read-only-first by default; destructive reset, terminate, or reseed is not automatic.
Any poisoned-history recovery records exact evidence such as `TMPRL1100`, `WorkflowTaskFailedCauseNonDeterministicError`, or `NonDeterministic` before recovery action.
Destructive poisoned-history actions require explicit user approval and audit evidence.
Existing poisoned-history classifiers/probes are reused; no duplicate regex-only classification path owns correctness.
Specs/docs state worker restart alone is not a repair for nondeterministic history mismatch.
Targeted tests plus `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and full `pnpm test` pass.
Preserve signal/query-only change workflow architecture; do not reintroduce `defineUpdate`.
Keep Temporal as the source of truth for live change state.
Make replay compatibility machine-verifiable; heuristic-only checks are insufficient.
Use existing poisoned-history classification/probe helpers where possible instead of duplicating classification logic.
Quarantine/read-only-first is the default recovery posture for already-poisoned terminal workflows.
Blocking replay checks apply to workflow-affecting changes under `plugin/src/temporal/**` and command-producing workflow helpers.
Current repo only.
Do not rely on worker restart or repeated retries as `TMPRL1100` repair.
Do not hide healthy WIP because one workflow query fails.
Do not terminate, reset, reseed, or mutate poisoned workflows without exact evidence and explicit approval.
Do not add broad workflow-handler rewrites beyond the replay/poison-isolation scope.
Do not weaken archive, worktree cleanup, or backlog claim safety checks.
Do not make Warp or terminal navigation part of correctness.
Do not hand-edit ADV state files or Temporal database rows.
Replacing Temporal as ADV's durable state engine.
Manual Temporal database surgery.
Broad rewrite of all change workflow handlers.
Task-completion semantics owned by `fixCompletionSemantics` / `fixTaskCompletion`.
Archive release ordering owned by `fixArchiveReleaseOrdering`, except documented interaction.
Terminal/Warp workspace switching behavior.
External `spec-conformance` integration unless design proves it is required.

rows.evidence: Replay determinism test uses Worker.runReplayHistory against committed histories; RED reproduced TMPRL1100 before compatibility patch; targeted and full tests passed.
rows.notes: Verified by replay-determinism test and task tk-56d8f209d83d/tk-f0ccf048b11a evidence.

rows.evidence: Committed fixGateAutoWorktree fixture metadata records incidentEventId 182, eventType EVENT_TYPE_ACTIVITY_TASK_SCHEDULED, TMPRL1100 cover string; replay test asserts metadata.
rows.notes: Fixture history and metadata are committed under temporal replay histories.

rows.evidence: workflows.ts defines DISCOVERY_CONTRACT_READINESS_PATCH='discovery-contract-readiness-v1' with rationale/deprecation comment and uses wf.patched for legacy discovery histories; specs/docs record workflow versioning rule.
rows.notes: No Worker Versioning needed for single-worker OpenCode deployment; patch route chosen.

rows.evidence: listWorktreesAcrossChanges returns structured records/warnings/poisonedWorkflows and catches per-change query failures; state-session-lifecycle test verifies healthy worktree remains visible with poisoned peer.
rows.notes: Targeted worktree tests passed after remediation.

rows.evidence: adv_wip_state exposes poisoned_workflows while preserving warnings; backlog tests verify structured metadata and healthy worktrees remain visible.
rows.notes: Additive response field; legacy array provider normalized.

rows.evidence: Poison detection paths only return metadata/warnings; docs/specs require quarantine/read-only-first and forbid automatic terminate/reset/reseed/archive/delete actions.
rows.notes: Review found no automatic destructive recovery action.

rows.evidence: workflowPoisonedDescriptionEvidence extracts bounded exact evidence including TMPRL1100/NonDeterministic markers; worktree and recovery-probe tests assert evidence capture.
rows.notes: Remediation added direct recovery-probe tests for marker and evidence bounds.

rows.evidence: No destructive poison recovery action was added; docs require explicit user approval/audit before destructive action; existing destructive ADV tools remain approval-gated.
rows.notes: Review confirmed poisoned workflow handling is read-only metadata only.

rows.evidence: worktree state imports shared recovery-probe and recovery-classification helpers; no local regex-only owner in state path; recovery-probe tests cover marker behavior.
rows.notes: Overlap risk noted as non-blocking suggestion; helper reuse is present.

rows.evidence: advance-workflow spec and docs/temporal-recovery.md state worker restart is not a TMPRL1100/nondeterminism repair; restart only after compatibility understood.
Post-remediation verification passed: targeted replay/backlog/worktree/recovery/gate/signal/spec-citation tests; pnpm run check; pnpm run build; full pnpm test; strict change validation.
rows.notes: RED signal test failed before continue-as-new seed fix, then passed after fix.

rows.evidence: changeWorkflow remains signal/query-only; no defineUpdate introduced; workflow tests and full suite passed.
Temporal remains live state source; change adds replay checks/read-path resilience, not alternate state authority.
Replay compatibility is machine-verified by Worker.runReplayHistory test, not heuristic-only inference.
Poisoned workflow classification reuses recovery-probe and temporal recovery-classification helpers.
Docs/specs and implementation keep poisoned terminal workflows in read-only metadata/quarantine posture by default.
Workflow-affecting change in temporal/ is covered by replay fixture test and compatibility patch policy/spec.
All changed files are within current Advance repo; cross-repo review found no target_repo/target_path work.
No worker restart/retry is used as TMPRL1100 repair; docs explicitly reject restart-only repair.
Worktree and WIP tests verify healthy WIP remains visible when a workflow query is poisoned.
Implementation records poison metadata only; no terminate/reset/reseed/mutate path added without evidence/approval.
Only targeted replay compatibility, worktree/WIP read resilience, specs/docs, and small review remediation were changed; no broad workflow-handler rewrite.
Archive, worktree cleanup, and backlog claim safety checks were not weakened; read-path changes are additive and partial-result preserving.
No terminal/Warp navigation behavior was made part of correctness.
No ADV state files or Temporal DB rows were manually edited; mutations used source edits and ADV tools only.
Temporal replacement was not implemented or proposed in code changes.
No manual Temporal database surgery performed.
No broad rewrite of all change workflow handlers; patch is targeted.
Task-completion semantics were not changed beyond tests/checkpoint evidence.
Archive release ordering was not modified except docs noting interaction.
Terminal/Warp workspace switching was not changed.
External spec-conformance integration was not added; design did not require it.
